Família do Norte.description: Brazilian criminal organization founded in 2007 in Manaus, Amazonas, led by drug traffickers Zé Roberto da Compensa, João Pinto Carioca, and Gelson Carnaúba. It was one of the largest criminal groups in Amazonas, involved in drug trafficking, murders, robberies, extortion, and prison rebellions. The group engaged in violent conflicts with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) and later with the Comando Vermelho (CV), leading to its decline and eventual dissolution around 2021.

descriptions: CV has violently fought with Familia do Norte in the Amazon region.
edges.evidence_quote: the CV, PCC, Familia do Norte, and Colombian militia groups including the Border Command and the Carolina Ramirez Front have violently fought

descriptions: Comando Vermelho had an alliance with Família do Norte that was broken in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: O Comando Vermelho historicamente tinha uma aliança com a facção Família do Norte , que foi rompida em 2019.

descriptions: After 2018, FDN and CV became enemies, engaging in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2018, the alliance dissolved, generating a confrontation between the CV and Familia do Norte

descriptions: CV took territories from FDN in 2020, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Em fevereiro de 2020, a facção carioca Comando Vermelho tomou vários territórios da FDN e dominando vários bairros de Manaus .

descriptions: FDN and CV were allied from 2015 to 2018 against PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2015 and 2018, the Familia do Norte and the Comando Vermelho (CV) formed an alliance to prevent the advance of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) in Amazonas

descriptions: FDN and CV were allies against PCC in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Cerca de um ano após a FDN declarar guerra contra o PCC com o apoio do CV, o grupo pôs em prática o plano de acabar com o PCC no Amazonas, em outubro de 2016.

descriptions: FDN and CV broke their alliance in 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: A Família do Norte teve a união quebrada com o Comando Vermelho em 2018, por motivos pessoais.

descriptions: FDN lists Guardiões do Estado as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho (after July 2020), Guardiões do Estado , Primeiro Comando da Capital

descriptions: FDN lists PCC as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho (after July 2020), Guardiões do Estado , Primeiro Comando da Capital

descriptions: FDN and PCC had conflicts that led to a war in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Após 2015, atritos entre PCC e FDN deram início a um confronto que eclodiu na Guerra entre PCC e CV em 2016 .

descriptions: CDN and RDA were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: O CDN tinha uma aliança com outra facção amazonense, os Revolucionários do Amazonas (RDA).

descriptions: FDN has connections with FARC in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Há fortes indícios de que a FDN faça parte de uma rede internacional de tráfico de drogas com fortes conexões com as FARC na Colômbia

edges.target: Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte
descriptions: SDC is listed as a rival of FDN in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: PCC [ carece de fontes ? ] , SDC [ carece de fontes ? ] , CV , etc.

descriptions: Guardiões do Estado is a rival of Família do Norte.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho , Família do Norte , Massa Carcerária [ pt ]

descriptions: PCC fought FDN for control of the North Region in 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 2017, a series of gruesome prison riots made headlines worldwide as the PCC fought for control of the North Region against the Família do Norte (FDN), erstwhile allies with the Red Command.

descriptions: PCC e FDN são rivais e entraram em confronto em 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Integrantes de duas quadrilhas rivais de tráfico de drogas, o Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) e a Família do Norte (FDN) — aliada do Comando Vermelho (CV) — entraram em confronto

Sam Gor.description: Sam Gor is an international crime syndicate based in Asia-Pacific, primarily involved in drug trafficking. It is made up of members from five triads and is headed by Chinese-Canadian Tse Chi Lop, who was arrested in 2021. The group controls an estimated 40-70% of the Asia-Pacific methamphetamine market and earns at least $8 billion per year. It is believed to manufacture meth in the Golden Triangle region of Myanmar.

descriptions: 14K is a component of the Sam Gor syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sam Gor syndicate is composed of 14K and other Triads and has Canadian roots in and leadership from the Big Circle Boys.

descriptions: Bamboo Union partners with Sam Gor Syndicate for drug trafficking and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bamboo Union is understood to partner with the Japanese yakuza and multi-ethnic triads like Sam Gor syndicate, and the leaders of these groups including Tse Chi Lop, both for drug trafficking and money laundering.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang evolved into or is linked to Sam Gor under Tse Chi Lop.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse Chi Lop, alleged to have assumed the leadership of the organisation and having taken it to higher levels as Sam Gor (The Company)

descriptions: Tse Chi Lop was a former member of Big Circle Gang and later leader of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse Chi Lop , Chinese Canadian kingpin, leader of Sam Gor , a powerful Asia-Pacific triad syndicate and former member of the Big Circle Gang

descriptions: 14K is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Bamboo Union is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Sam Gor's leader Tse Chi Lop was formerly a member of the Big Circle Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse is a former member of the Hong Kong-based crime group, the Big Circle Gang.

descriptions: Big Circle Boys (Big Circle Gang) is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Comancheros (Comanchero Motorcycle Club) is listed as an ally of Sam Gor in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K, Bamboo Union, Big Circle Gang, Sun Yee On, Wo Shing Wo, Yamaguchi-gumi, United Wa State Army, Lebanese mafia, Comancheros, Hells Angels

descriptions: Hells Angels is listed as an ally of Sam Gor in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K, Bamboo Union, Big Circle Gang, Sun Yee On, Wo Shing Wo, Yamaguchi-gumi, United Wa State Army, Lebanese mafia, Comancheros, Hells Angels

edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K, Bamboo Union, Big Circle Gang, Sun Yee On, Wo Shing Wo, Yamaguchi-gumi, United Wa State Army, Lebanese mafia, Comancheros, Hells Angels

edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

Dubois brothers.description: French-Canadian organized crime group consisting of nine brothers, active in Montreal from the 1950s to the mid-1980s. They engaged in extortion, drug trafficking, loan sharking, and murder, and were considered the most important criminal organization in Quebec by the Quebec Crime Commission. They rivaled the Cotroni family and were feared by outlaw motorcycle gangs and the Mafia.

descriptions: The Dubois gang is listed as a rival of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: Devil's Disciples had a longstanding feud with Dubois Brothers over drug trade.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang had a longstanding feud with the infamous Dubois Brothers

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers rivaled the Cotroni family for control in Montreal.
edges.evidence_quote: By the 1960s the Dubois Brothers were gaining control and were becoming the only crime group in Montreal that were considered to rival the Cotroni family in the 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: Dubois Brothers fought Devil's Disciples for control of drug territory, hiring Popeyes to attack them.
edges.evidence_quote: Claude Dubois considered this as a threat and intrusion into his and his Brothers territory and hired another muscle group of bikers called the Popeyes Motorcycle Club led by Yves Buteau.

descriptions: Dubois Brothers and McSween gang fought a turf war starting in 1973.
edges.evidence_quote: The war between the two groups, Dubois Brothers and the McSween gang, broke out in 1973.

descriptions: McSween gang became associates of Dubois Brothers in 1957, cooperating in criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dubois Brothers had the McSweens, an Irish-Canadian gang, join their associates in 1957 after one of the Brothers met Pierre McSween in reform school while serving a two-year term for theft.

descriptions: Dubois Brothers hired Popeyes Motorcycle Club to fight Devil's Disciples, cooperating in the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Claude Dubois considered this as a threat and intrusion into his and his Brothers territory and hired another muscle group of bikers called the Popeyes Motorcycle Club led by Yves Buteau.

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers eliminated the Irish gang.
edges.evidence_quote: This allowed the Brothers to wipe out the rival Irish gang

descriptions: The Popeyes worked as muscle for the Dubois Brothers crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1970s, the Popeyes began working as "muscle" for the Dubois Brothers

descriptions: Dubois Brothers backed the Popeyes in the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The same underworld struggle drew in the Irish West End Gang on the side of Satan's Choice while the Dubois Brothers gang backed the Popeyes.

descriptions: Rock Machine founder Salvatore Cazzetta had contacts with the Dubois Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Cazzetta spoke fluent French, English and Italian and had contacts with the Rizzuto crime family, the West End Gang, and the Dubois Gang.

descriptions: Catford Wildcatz is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Catford Wildcats (Anti Shower), Peckham Boys , Woolwich Boys , Cherry Boys

descriptions: Catford Wildcatz is a splinter group from Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Ghetto Boys members in Catford split off from the gang to form their own gang called the Catford Wildcatz

descriptions: Montescuro had a good relationship with the Mariano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Montescuro also had a good relationship with Marco Mariano, boss of the Mariano clan in the 1990s

descriptions: Montescuro mediated between Missos, Mazzarellas and Continis during a war.
edges.evidence_quote: he was able to put the Missos, the Mazzarellas and the Continis at the same table when the war between their organisations was at its peak in the early 2000s

descriptions: Montescuro mediated between Missos, Mazzarellas and Continis during a war.
edges.evidence_quote: he was able to put the Missos, the Mazzarellas and the Continis at the same table when the war between their organisations was at its peak in the early 2000s

Scarface gang.description: The Scarface gang was a criminal gang possibly from the Netherlands, active in the 2000s and early 2010s. It consisted of two to six men and sometimes a woman, responsible for a series of violent armed robberies in Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, and France. The gang was named after the character Tony Montana from the film Scarface. Four members were arrested in December 2011, while two fled to Morocco and one disappeared.

descriptions: The Aprea and Celeste-Guarino clans were in conflict in Barra.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra gli Aprea e i Celeste-Guarino : combattuta nella zona di Barra tra il clan Aprea e quella che secondo gli investigatori era la fazione scissionista dei Celeste-Guarino negli anni 2005 e 2006.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan fought a violent feud with the Celeste-Guarino clan in 2005-2006.
edges.evidence_quote: Aprea-Cuccaro clan and Celeste-Guarino clan : A violent feud fought in the area of Barra, between the Aprea-Cuccaro clan and what according to investigators, was the splitting faction of the Celeste-Guarino in the years 2005 and 2006.

descriptions: The Gambino family lists Group America as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Crips, Group America, Hells Angels MC, Latin Kings, ...

descriptions: Group America's founder maintained links with the Gambino family, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: He also maintained links with the Gambino crime family and its boss, John Gotti.

descriptions: Group America's founder joined the Westies, indicating structural origin.
edges.evidence_quote: The group originated in the 1970s, when Serbian nationalist Boško "The Yugo" Radonjić emigrated from Yugoslavia to the United States and joined the Westies

descriptions: PCC lists Group America as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Europe : 'Ndrangheta , Group America , Albanian mafia , Russian mafia .

descriptions: Lo Presti formed alliances with the Racco 'ndrina in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti di affari con la Famiglia Inzerillo -Spatola-Gambino di Palermo , attraverso la quale strinse alleanze anche oltreoceano con la Famiglia Gambino di New York e con le famiglie della 'Ndrangheta in Canada degli Zito , dei Commisso , dei Racco, degli Stalteri a Toronto e dei Cotroni a Montréal .

descriptions: Mongols, Hells Angels, Straight Satans, and Glendale Night Riders jointly committed a sexual assault in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Glendale Mongols chapter, along with bikers from the San Bernardino chapter of the Hells Angels, the Straight Satans of Venice, and the Glendale Night Riders, committed a sexual assault on a fifteen-year-old girl in August 1972.

descriptions: Castellammarese clan fought Masseria clan in the Castellammarese War.
edges.evidence_quote: violence broke out between a faction led by Giuseppe "Joe the Boss" Masseria and members of the Castellammareses over the theft of Masseria's bootleg liquor. This soon developed into a full out war known as the Castellammarese War.

descriptions: Masseria and Maranzano's Castellammarese clan fought the Castellammarese War.
edges.evidence_quote: By the late 1920s, Masseria's main rival was boss Salvatore Maranzano, who had come from Sicily to run the Castellammarese clan. Their rivalry eventually escalated into the bloody Castellammarese War.

descriptions: Masseria family and Castellammarese clan fought each other in the Castellammarese War.
edges.evidence_quote: violence erupted between the two rival New York City families. The violence became known as the Castellammarese War, Joe Masseria with his Mafia family battled with Salvatore Maranzano, who was the boss of the Brooklyn-based Castellammarese clan

descriptions: The Alameddine family and KVT were long-time allies but allegedly began feuding in 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2025, The Daily Telegraph reported that in-fighting had allegedly began between the Alameddine family and the KVT street gang, their long-time ally.

descriptions: KVT is used as muscle by the Alameddines.
edges.evidence_quote: Police sources stated that Vokai was viewed as the leader of the infamous Islander gang KVT, who have regularly been used as muscle by the Alameddines.

descriptions: Associates of both networks jointly attempted a robbery.
edges.evidence_quote: On 29 November 2024, associates of the Alameddine and KVT crime networks attempted to rob a tobacco delivery truck in Guildford.

descriptions: The Nuovo Clan Partenio was formed by individuals previously linked to the Cava clan but operated without their approval, indicating a splinter or independent faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra gli arrestati (23, in tutto) e gli indagati (17, in tutto), figurano alcuni pregiudicati in passato ritenuti legati ai Cava, che avevano costituito il sodalizio di propria iniziativa, operando senza il beneplacito dei Cava

descriptions: Gruppo Caterino-Ferriero is part of the Bidognetti faction.
edges.evidence_quote: 8 esponenti del gruppo "Caterino-Ferriero" di Cesa facente parte della fazione Bidognetti

descriptions: White Knights split from Original Knights.
edges.evidence_quote: The White Knights of the Ku Klux Klan formed later in 1964 after breaking away from the Original Knights.

descriptions: Al Salam 313 is ideologically based on Sarāyā al-Salām.
edges.evidence_quote: The Salam 313 has members in Central and North Europe and is based on the ideology of the Iraqi Shia militia Sarāyā al-Salām (former Mahdi Army).

descriptions: The two groups were in intense confrontation, fighting for control of fuel supply routes.
edges.evidence_quote: La intensa confrontación entre la NDPVF y NDV parece haber sido provocada por política de enfrentamiento de Asiri y el financiamiento del NDPVF a la campaña de Peter Odili, gobernador del estado de Rivers tras las elecciones de abril de 2003.

descriptions: NDV was protected by government forces from NDPVF attacks, indicating conflict between NDPVF and NDV.
edges.evidence_quote: El gobierno del estado respondió la escalada de la campaña en su contra mediante el envío de la policía, el ejército y la marina que ocupó Port Harcourt, en junio de 2004. Las fuerzas del gobierno colaboró con el NDV durante el verano, y dieron protección a milicianos del NDV de los ataques de la NDPVF.

descriptions: NDV was used as a paramilitary group to eliminate NDPVF, confirming conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Odili retiró su apoyo financiero al NDPVF y comenzó a apoyar NDV de Tom, usándolo como grupo paramilitar para acabar con el NDPVF.

Simon City Royals.description: The Simon City Royals are a street and prison gang founded in Chicago in 1952 as Simon City, later merging with the Ashland Royals in 1969. They are heavily involved in drug trafficking, racketeering, and loan sharking, and have expanded to other states, notably Mississippi. The gang is one of the oldest and largest white gangs in the US and remains active.

Philadelphia crime family.description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, founded around 1911 by Salvatore Sabella. It operates throughout the Greater Philadelphia metropolitan area and South Jersey, known for violence and internal conflicts. The family experienced a peaceful era under Angelo Bruno (1959-1980) before a series of violent successions and wars. Currently active, with membership estimated at 50 made members and 100 associates as of 2004.

descriptions: The gang has been both allied with and feuded against the Philadelphia crime family at various times.
edges.evidence_quote: Under different leadership, the group has both been allied closely with and violently feuded against the Philadelphia crime family at various times.

descriptions: The gang has been both allied with and feuded against the Philadelphia crime family at various times.

descriptions: Genovese supported Scarfo in Philadelphia war, gaining Atlantic City access.
edges.evidence_quote: After the 1980 murder of Philadelphia boss Angelo "Gentle Don" Bruno, Gigante and Lombardo began manipulating the rival factions in the war-torn Philadelphia family. They finally gave their support to Philadelphia mobster Nicodemo "Little Nicky" Scarfo, who in return gave the Genovese mobsters permission to operate in Atlantic City in 1982.

descriptions: Genovese soldier Alex Conigliaro was indicted alongside members of the Philadelphia family in a multi-family racketeering case.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 2016, Conigliaro was one of 46 defendants linked to the Genovese, Gambino, Lucchese, Bonanno and Philadelphia families indicted for multiple racketeering offenses.

descriptions: Philadelphia family was represented by the Genovese family on the Commission.
edges.evidence_quote: Philadelphia crime family – held a seat from 1961 to 1980

descriptions: Genovese New Jersey faction planned to take over Philadelphia family's operations after Bruno's murder.
edges.evidence_quote: The killing prompted discussions and plans by the Genovese and Gambino families to take over Bruno's criminal operations.

descriptions: K&A Gang member John Berkery was indicted alongside Scarfo crime family soldier Raymond Martorano for a methamphetamine ring.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, Scarfo crime family soldier Raymond Martorano, Berkery, and dozens of others, were indicted for their involvement in a large methamphetamine ring.

descriptions: The K&A Gang had amicable ties with the Scarfo crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: They were known to have amicable ties to the La Cosa Nostra , namely the Scarfo crime family

descriptions: Lucchese family lists Philadelphia family as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Philadelphia crime family

descriptions: Cooperation between the New Jersey faction and Philadelphia ended after Bruno's murder.
edges.evidence_quote: the relationship between Philadelphia and the New York Families, especially the Luccheses, eventually turned worse after the murder of Angelo Bruno, which led to all cooperation between the families being completely terminated.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists Philadelphia as an ally of the New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

descriptions: Infobox lists Philadelphia crime family as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Familia criminal de Filadelfia

descriptions: The infobox lists the Philadelphia crime family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Buffalo crime family , Chicago Outfit , Cleveland crime family , Dallas crime family , Gambino crime family , Genovese crime family , Kansas City crime family , Los Angeles crime family , Philadelphia crime family , Trafficante crime family , Dixie Mafia , Outlaws MC

descriptions: New Orleans family authorized Philadelphia family to operate in New Orleans.
edges.evidence_quote: Carollo's underboss, Frank "Fat Frank" Gagliano Sr., also authorized a request by representatives of the Philadelphia family for permission to move into casino gambling and cocaine trafficking in New Orleans.

descriptions: Philadelphia crime family listed as ally in infobox.

descriptions: Patriarca family capo Matthew Guglielmetti worked with Philadelphia family capo George Borgesi, indicating cooperation between the two families.
edges.evidence_quote: Since his release, Guglielmetti has been working with Philadelphia family capo George Borgesi.

descriptions: Merlino's men beat Turra for failing to pay street tax, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, Louis Turra, leader of a Philadelphia drug gang, the 10th & Oregon Crew, was severely beaten by Merlino's men, allegedly for failing to pay a Mafia street tax on the gang's illegal earnings.

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 10th & Oregon Crew

descriptions: The Black Mafia formed to take control from the Philadelphia family, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1970, Samuel "Beyah" Christian and other African-American organized crime figures formed the Black Mafia to take control of illegal activities in the Black neighborhoods of Philadelphia from the Italian Mafia, a venture which was partially successful.

descriptions: Listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Mafia

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bufalino crime family

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: DeCavalcante crime family

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.

descriptions: In the video game, the Philadelphia family is an enemy of the DiMeo/Soprano family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Philadelphia Crime Family (also known as the Buscetta Crime Family) are led by ruthless mob boss Angelo "Angie" Buscetta and are considered enemies of the DiMeo/Soprano crime family.

descriptions: Philadelphia family member Leonetti was to testify against Gambino boss Gotti, indicating legal conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: He was scheduled to testify against Gambino crime family boss John Gotti on January 21, 1992, however Gambino underboss Sammy "the Bull" Gravano agreed to testify instead.

descriptions: Angelo Bruno was a close ally of Carlo Gambino, solidifying his position as boss.
edges.evidence_quote: Bruno used his contacts and his own business mind to maintain respect and power among other Mafia bosses in the country. He expanded the family's profit and operations in Atlantic City, which, due in part to its location within the Philadelphia metro area, had naturally become known as the Philadelphia family's turf.

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gambino crime family

descriptions: Gambino family supported Stanfa's installation as boss of Philadelphia family.
edges.evidence_quote: Giovanni "John" Stanfa, a Sicilian-born mobster with the support and endorsement of the influential Gambino and Genovese families in New York, was named boss of the Philadelphia family in 1990.

descriptions: The Genovese family claimed territory and was involved in the dispute leading to Bruno's murder.
edges.evidence_quote: A complex dispute involving disgruntled subordinates and territory claims by New York 's Genovese crime family led to Bruno's murder in 1980.

descriptions: Genovese family had territory claims against Philadelphia family, leading to Bruno's murder.
edges.evidence_quote: A complex dispute involving disgruntled subordinates and territory claims by New York's Genovese crime family led to Bruno's murder in 1980.

descriptions: The Genovese family's territory claims contributed to the murder of Philadelphia boss Angelo Bruno, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A complex dispute involving disgruntled subordinates and territory claims by New York's Genovese crime family led to Bruno's murder in 1980.

descriptions: The Genovese family's territory claims contributed to the murder of Philadelphia boss Angelo Bruno.

descriptions: The Genovese family had territory claims against the Philadelphia family, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A complex dispute involving disgruntled subordinates and territory claims by New York's Genovese crime family led to Bruno's murder in 1980.

descriptions: Genovese boss Gigante ordered murder contracts against Philadelphia family members as retaliation.
edges.evidence_quote: He testified against Genovese crime family boss Vincent Gigante in 1997 and claimed Gigante ordered 6 murder contracts as retaliation for murdering Philadelphia bosses Angelo Bruno and Phil Testa without approval from the other crime families, specifically in New York.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Genovese crime family

edges.evidence_quote: Jackie DiNorscio ... later defects to the Lucchese crime family due to a bloody internal feud within the Philadelphia crime family.

descriptions: The Young Turks were a faction within the Philadelphia crime family that challenged the boss.
edges.evidence_quote: Along with Joey Merlino, he was a leading member of the "Young Turks" faction which challenged the leadership of family boss John Stanfa during the early 1990s.

edges.target: North Jersey faction of the Bruno family
descriptions: The North Jersey faction was a part of the Bruno family (Philadelphia crime family).
edges.evidence_quote: Bocchino was initially a member of the North Jersey faction of the Bruno family and was in the Newark crew headed by Antonio Caponigro during the 1960s and 1970s.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Pagan's MC

descriptions: Merlino used Pagans to settle disputes, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Merlino was friends with Steve "Gorilla" Mondevergine, president of the Philadelphia chapter of the Pagan's Motorcycle Club. Merlino sometimes used the Pagans to help settle underworld disputes.

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Since his release from prison, Borgesi has traveled to Rhode Island forming an alliance with Patriarca crime family underboss Matthew Guglielmetti.

descriptions: Both families are described as the most dysfunctional, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: The crime reporter George Anastasia has described the organization as one of the two most dysfunctional Mafia families in the United States, along with the Patriarca crime family of New England.

descriptions: Robert Luisi Jr. moved from Patriarca family to Philadelphia family, showing a transfer of membership.
edges.evidence_quote: Originally an associate of the Patriarca crime family, he joined the Philadelphia mob and became inducted in 1998.

descriptions: Scarfo had Bouras killed for refusing to pay street tax, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: When Greek-American gangster Chelsais "Steve" Bouras, boss of the Philadelphia Greek Mob, began intruding on the methamphetamine trade in Philadelphia and refused to pay Scarfo's street tax, Scarfo had him killed.

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Philadelphia Greek Mob

edges.evidence_quote: The group was closely affiliated with the Italian-American Philadelphia crime family, and fell under complete control of the family during the reign of Philadelphia Mafia boss Nicky Scarfo.

descriptions: Babylon Brigades clashed with Nineveh Plains Protection Units over a base.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2023 there was a brief clash between the Babylon Brigades and the Assyrians of Qaraqosh after the former attempted to take control of a base belonging to the Nineveh Plains Protection Units.

descriptions: FK and FOB were rival gangs engaged in a gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2002 and 2009, there was a bloody gang war between two rival East Asian gangs the FK and FOB gangs which resulted in 25 gang related murders.

Commisso 'ndrina.description: The Commisso 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Siderno, Calabria, Italy, with a branch in the Greater Toronto Area, Canada. Founded in the 1930s by Antonio Macrì, it is involved in international drug trafficking, racketeering, money laundering, and extortion. The clan emerged as a dominant force in Siderno after the First 'Ndrangheta war and has been active in conflicts with rival clans such as the Costa 'ndrina.

descriptions: Alvaro and Macrì were allied against Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo in the Sinopoli feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Commisso per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mancuso 'ndrina , Commisso 'ndrina

descriptions: The Commisso and Cataldo were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 giugno 2009 nell'operazione vengono arrestate 50 persone presunte componenti di un traffico internazionale di droga, tra cui i Commisso e i Cataldo

descriptions: Commisso 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Cordì 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Commisso 'ndrina , Aquino 'ndrina, Ursino 'ndrina

descriptions: Costa and Commisso were in conflict in the Siderno feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Siderno : combattuta a partire dal 1987 quando la 'ndrina dei Costa volle rendersi autonoma dalla potente 'ndrina dei Commisso.

descriptions: The Costa later became a rival faction to the Commisso.
edges.evidence_quote: Successivamente diventano fazione rivale.

descriptions: The Costa were initially allies of the Commisso, later became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: I Costa sono una 'ndrina di Siderno , inizialmente alleati dei Commisso . Successivamente diventano fazione rivale.

descriptions: The Curciarello switched allegiance to the Commisso during the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: con lo scatenarsi della faida negli anni 1980 sono passati ai Commisso

descriptions: De Stefano killed Macrì during the first 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: poi i De Stefano reagiscono uccidendo i vecchi capi Macrì e Tripodo annientando così la vecchia guardia

descriptions: De Stefano and Macrì were in conflict, with attacks on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: il 24 novembre del 1974 un commando fece irruzione nel bar Roof Garden sul lungomare di Reggio Calabria uccidendo Giovanni De Stefano e ferendo Giorgio De Stefano capo della 'ndrina; l'anno seguente, esattamente il 20 gennaio 1975, viene ucciso da un commando don Antonio Macrì

descriptions: Macrì was a rival in the first war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: First 'Ndrangheta war (1974-76): Domenico Tripodo and Antonio Macrì

descriptions: Vincenzo Roccisano era broker comune per Jerinò, Aquino e Commisso.
edges.evidence_quote: Vincenzo Roccisano, di Gioiosa Jonica , broker degli Jerinò, degli Aquino e dei Commisso .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Lo Presti formed alliances with the Commisso 'ndrina in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti di affari con la Famiglia Inzerillo -Spatola-Gambino di Palermo , attraverso la quale strinse alleanze anche oltreoceano con la Famiglia Gambino di New York e con le famiglie della 'Ndrangheta in Canada degli Zito , dei Commisso , dei Racco, degli Stalteri a Toronto e dei Cotroni a Montréal .

descriptions: Other 'ndrine seek support from the Commisso against the Mancuso, indicating conflict between Mancuso and Commisso.
edges.evidence_quote: altre meno potenti del vibonese come gli Anello , i Fiumara, gli Emanuele di Gerocarne , i Vallelunga , i Tassone, i Mantella, i Bonavota e i Piscopisani cercano appoggio nei Commisso

descriptions: The Mandalari are allies of the Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Macrì

descriptions: Piromalli and Macrì were in conflict in the First war of 'ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Prima guerra di 'ndrangheta : Combattuta tra 1974 e il 1976, scoppiò per il desiderio dei Piromalli d'entrare nel narcotraffico e rapimenti, desiderio osteggiato dal vecchio Antonio Macrì

descriptions: Piromalli led the new faction opposed to Macrì's old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: si ruppero quindi i vecchi equilibri all'interno dell'organizzazione criminale e presero forma due schieramenti tra loro contrapposti: da un lato la vecchia guardia con a capo Don Antonio Macrì e Don Mico Tripodo, dall'altra la nuova 'ndrangheta capeggiata da Don Mommo Piromalli e dai De Stefano

descriptions: Ruga and Commisso were involved together in water transport.
edges.evidence_quote: Avrebbero dovuto pagare un 'diritto di carico' per evitare rischi durante il trasporto delle bottiglie d'acqua lungo la penisola, in cui erano coinvolti anche i Commisso

descriptions: Ursino and Macrì are related and often operate together as Ursino-Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Renato Macrì, nipote degli Ursino ed elemento di spicco dell’omonimo clan

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Commisso for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Commisso di Siderno

descriptions: The Commisso 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Commisso 'ndrina ( Italian: [komˈmisso, ˈkɔmmisso] ) is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta , a criminal and mafia-type organization in Calabria , Italy .

descriptions: Commisso and Cataldo were arrested together in drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono arrestate 50 persone ... tra cui i Commisso e i Cataldo

descriptions: The Costa 'ndrina challenged the Commisso 'ndrina for control of Siderno, leading to a violent feud.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s, the Commisso were challenged by the Costa 'ndrina over the command of Siderno.

descriptions: Commisso was in a feud with Costa.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine degli anni ottanta scoppia la faida con la 'ndrina dei Costa

descriptions: Commisso cooperated with Ierinò in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: per la 'ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso, Coluccio , Aquino e Pesce

descriptions: Commisso (as Ursino-Macrì) cooperated with Jerinò in extortion and usury.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione 'Tipographic' ... 36 persone presunte affiliate agli Ursino -Macrì e Jerinò

descriptions: Commisso cooperated with Mazzaferro in port construction.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro e agli Ursino.

descriptions: Commisso and Molè were allies against Costa in the Siderno feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Ebbe termine nei primi anni novanta dopo più di 50 morti e vide un forte ridimensionamento dei Costa , sconfitti dai Commisso che ebbero l'aiuto di altre cosche reggine come i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Commisso and Piromalli were allies against Costa in the Siderno feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Ebbe termine nei primi anni novanta dopo più di 50 morti e vide un forte ridimensionamento dei Costa , sconfitti dai Commisso che ebbero l'aiuto di altre cosche reggine come i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Piromalli helped Commisso eliminate Costa members.
edges.evidence_quote: anche con l'aiuto di cosche reggine come i Piromalli , furono uccisi gli ultimi esponenti dei Costa

descriptions: The Buffalo crime family hired Kirby to kill Volpe in cooperation with the Commisso brothers.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s, the Buffalo crime family also operated in Toronto and Hamilton , and hired Kirby to kill Paul Volpe and his driver Pietro Scarcella in an arrangement with Rocco Remo and Cosimo Commisso, for $20,000.

descriptions: The Commisso 'ndrina became a member of the Camera di controllo after the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: They were members of Camera di controllo , a provincial commission of the 'Ndrangheta formed at the end of the Second 'Ndrangheta war in September 1991, to avoid further internal conflicts.

descriptions: The Commisso 'ndrina is based in Siderno and is part of the Siderno Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Siderno is home to one of the 'Ndrangheta's biggest and most important clans, the Commisso 'ndrina

descriptions: Clan Cappello (as Pillera-Cappello) was at war with Clan Savasta.
edges.evidence_quote: La guerra tra i Pillera-Cappello da un lato e gli Sciuto-Laudani e Savasta dall'altro causò numerosi episodi di sangue

descriptions: Clan Savasta was a historical ally of Clan Ferlito-Pillera.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli storici alleati del clan Ferlito-Pillera, cioè il clan Savasta

descriptions: Clan Savasta sought alliance with Clan Laudani.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo della Savasta guidato da Antonio Puglisi cerco alleanze con il clan Laudani

Clan dei Cursoti.description: Italian criminal organization originating from the Antico Corso area of Catania, Sicily. Active since the 1970s, it operated in northern Italy, especially Milan and Turin. The clan is divided into two factions, historically in conflict: the Milanese faction and the Catania faction. It was formed to counter the power of the Catania Mafia families led by Giuseppe Calderone and Benedetto Santapaola.

descriptions: Pelle 'ndrina cooperates with the Cursoti clan in Catania.
edges.evidence_quote: as well as with other criminal organizations operating in the city that are not part of Cosa Nostra, such as the Cappello clan and the Cursoti clan

descriptions: The Catania Mafia family waged war against the Cursoti faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Santapaola launched a war against the Cursoti, a rival faction.

descriptions: The Chiofaliani were allied with the Cursoti clan from Catania.
edges.evidence_quote: I "Chiofaliani" erano alleati della 'ndrangheta , del clan catanese dei Cursoti

descriptions: Bonaccorsi brothers, members of Cursoti, were affiliated with Cappello.
edges.evidence_quote: I fratelli Bonaccorsi Ignazio e Concetto, detti " i carateddi ", erano membri dei Cursoti catanesi

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi was the Turin branch of the Cursoti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Catanesi ... era la frangia torinese del clan catanese dei Cursoti

descriptions: The Santapaola clan was allied with the Laudani clan and thus supported the Catania faction of Cursoti.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: The Milanese faction of Cursoti is allied with the Cappello clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo momento risulta legata da alleanza ai clan Cappello , Sciuto-Tigna e Piacenti detti Ceusi .

descriptions: The Cappello clan supported the Milanese faction of Cursoti in the 1991 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: The Laudani clan supported the Catania faction of Cursoti in the 1991 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: The Ercolano clan was allied with the Laudani clan and thus supported the Catania faction of Cursoti.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: The Ferrera clan was allied with the Laudani clan and thus supported the Catania faction of Cursoti.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: The Malpassoti clan was allied with the Laudani clan and thus supported the Catania faction of Cursoti.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: The Catania faction of Cursoti is closely linked to the Mazzei clan.
edges.evidence_quote: la seconda, detta dei Cursoti catanesi , era guidata da Giuseppe Garozzo detto Pippo 'u maritatu, saldamente legato al clan storicamente capeggiato da Santo Mazzei detto ' u Carcagnusu .

descriptions: The Milanese faction of Cursoti is allied with the Piacenti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo momento risulta legata da alleanza ai clan Cappello , Sciuto-Tigna e Piacenti detti Ceusi .

descriptions: The Milanese faction of Cursoti is allied with the Sciuto-Tigna clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo momento risulta legata da alleanza ai clan Cappello , Sciuto-Tigna e Piacenti detti Ceusi .

descriptions: The Milanese faction of Cursoti cooperated with the Stidda in arms and drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 ottobre 1993 l'inchiesta del GICO della Guardia di Finanza , coordinata dalla Direzione Distrettuale Antimafia di Firenze , portò all'arresto di Jimmy Miano ed altri appartenenti alla banda dei Cursoti milanesi, che avevano la loro base operativa presso l'autoparco di via Oreste Salomone a Milano , dove gestivano imponenti traffici di armi e droga insieme ad esponenti della Stidda di Gela

descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Murder Zone.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as Murder Zone (MZ)

Locale di Piscopio.description: Italian 'Ndrangheta organization based in the Piscopio district of Vibo Valentia, founded between 2009 and 2010. It engages in drug trafficking and extortion, with connections to other 'Ndrangheta clans in Calabria and Turin. The group was involved in the Stefanaconi feud (2011-2012) and has been targeted by multiple police operations.

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio is a member organization of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La Locale di Piscopio o Società di Piscopio , talvolta anche Clan dei piscopisani è un'organizzazione criminale appartenente alla 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Bonavota in the vibonese area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti nel vibonese con i Bonavota

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Pelle di San Luca in the rest of Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel resto della Calabria con i Pelle di San Luca

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel resto della Calabria con ... gli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Catalano in the Turin area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel torinese con i Catalano e D'Onofrio

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Commisso di Siderno.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel resto della Calabria con ... i Commisso di Siderno

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with D'Onofrio in the Turin area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel torinese con i Catalano e D'Onofrio

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio was involved in a feud with Patania in Stefanaconi in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2011 a Stefanaconi scoppia l'omonima faida di Stefanaconi con i Patania

Killer Beez.description: Large street gang based in New Zealand, mainly in South Auckland. Founded in 2003 in Ōtara as a spin-off of the Tribesmen gang by Josh Masters, a former vice-president of Tribesmen MC. Involved in drug manufacturing, sales, robbery, assassination, fraud, and money laundering. Known for their distinctive patch and association with Colourway Records.

descriptions: Infobox lists Killa Beez as an ally of Black Power.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Crips , Killa Beez (gang) , King Cobras (gang) New Zealand Nomads

descriptions: Members of both gangs were involved in a shooting together, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2017, members of the Killer Beez and the 36 (Three Six) gangs were involved in a shooting, where three males in Ōtara were shot in a drive-by shooting.

descriptions: Black Power is listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)

descriptions: Bloods is listed as a rival of Killer Beez in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods , Mongrel Mob , Tribesmen

descriptions: BTW is listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)

descriptions: Crips is listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)

descriptions: Mongrel Mob is listed as a rival of Killer Beez in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods , Mongrel Mob , Tribesmen

descriptions: A Tribesmen member shot Killer Beez leader Josh Masters, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 April 2019 Killer Beez head Josh Masters, a prominent gang member was shot by a member of the Tribesmen at a Harley Davidson dealership in Mount Wellington, Auckland.

descriptions: Conflicts between the two gangs led to multiple shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2022, conflicts between the Tribesmen and Killer Beez led to shootings in South Auckland.

descriptions: Killer Beez was founded as a spin-off of the Tribesmen gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They were founded in 2003, as a large rogue street gang in Ōtara, as a spin-off of the larger 'Tribesmen' gang.

descriptions: Killer Beez is listed as a rival of Mongrel Mob in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Power, Road Knights, Tribesmen, and Killer Beez

descriptions: Relationship deteriorated into conflict with shootings in 2019 and 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: The relationship between Tribesmen and Killer Beez deteriorated in 2019 with the shooting of Killer Beez president Josh Masters, and resulted in multiple outbreaks of gunfire in Auckland and Kaitaia in 2022.

descriptions: Killer Beez was founded as a feeder gang for the Tribesmen.
edges.evidence_quote: The Killer Beez were founded in 2003 by then-Vice President of the Tribesmen New Zealand, Josh Masters, as a feeder gang for the Tribesmen.

descriptions: 39ers gang is formed from G-Strip gang and 3-N-G.
edges.evidence_quote: The " 39ers gang, " is a “hybrid” force of the Upper 9th Ward's G-Strip (Gallier Street) gang and 3-N-G
